rationale: The citing paper’s core constructs (subgoal completion, goal persistence, goal gradient, progress measures) closely overlap with the cited paper’s central contributions on human goal gradients, proportional goal distance, and illusionary progress in reward programs. The citing note explicitly says it extends prior subgoal/goal-progress research to a long-horizon debt context, making this 2006 JMRK article a plausible foundational theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention.
